moments.title: World Cup 2026 Final Aftermath
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 concluded on July 19th with Spain beating Argentina in the final, marking their second championship title, while England secured third place.

angles.name: England's performance
angles.copy: Still buzzing from the World Cup? Spain might have lifted the trophy on Sunday, but a huge shout out to England for finishing third – what a tournament for the Three Lions!

angles.name: Final score talk
angles.copy: Spain are your 2026 World Cup champions after a thrilling final against Argentina! Who caught the action and what was your highlight?

moments.title: The Open Championship Concludes
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale, Southport, concluded on Sunday, July 19th, with Ryan Fox winning by one stroke.

angles.name: Golf talk
angles.copy: The Claret Jug has a new home! Ryan Fox is your Champion Golfer of the Year after a fantastic finish at Royal Birkdale on Sunday. Did you tune in?

angles.name: Royal Birkdale recap
angles.copy: What a week of golf at Royal Birkdale! The 154th Open Championship delivered all the drama. Who was your player of the tournament?

moments.title: Latitude Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, one of the UK's major music and arts events, runs from July 23-26, 2026, at Henham Park in Suffolk.

angles.name: Festival excitement
angles.copy: Get ready, Suffolk! Latitude Festival kicks off tomorrow with four days of incredible music, comedy, and arts at Henham Park. Who are you buzzing to see?

angles.name: Last minute plans
angles.copy: Latitude is almost here! If you're heading to Henham Park this weekend, what's your festival essential? Sunnies? Wellies? Both?

moments.title: Together Again Festival This Weekend
moments.blurb: The Together Again Festival, a celebration of music, arts, and culture, takes place from July 24-26, 2026, at Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire.

angles.name: Weekend festival vibe
angles.copy: Cheshire, are you ready? Together Again Festival is just two days away at Bolesworth Castle! Three days of world-class music, arts and good vibes. Who's going?

angles.name: Dance stage anticipation
angles.copy: If you're hitting Together Again Festival this weekend, you know the Agora stage is going to be HUGE. Three days of tech house, disco, and bass await! #TogetherAgain #NationDance

moments.title: Big Love Festival in South Wales
moments.blurb: Big Love, the 'UK's friendliest small festival', is celebrating its 10th year this July in the South Wales countryside.

angles.name: Local Welsh festival
angles.copy: South Wales is buzzing this July as Big Love Festival celebrates its 10th anniversary! Who's heading to the friendliest small festival in the UK?

angles.name: 10th anniversary
angles.copy: Happy 10th birthday to Big Love Festival! This South Wales gem is bringing bands, DJs, and good times to the countryside this month. What's your favourite Big Love memory?

moments.title: Official Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official Singles Chart Update for the week ending July 25th, 2026, was released on July 20th, featuring new entries and 'Song of the Summer' contenders.

angles.name: Chart discussion
angles.copy: The latest Official Singles Chart Update is out! Who's holding strong at the top and what new tracks are making waves? #OfficialCharts #NewMusic

angles.name: Song of the Summer contenders
angles.copy: Is 'ANOTR ft. 54 Ultra – Talk To You' your Song of the Summer? The Official Charts are buzzing with contenders, including new tracks from Madonna and Sienna Spiro!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, began on June 1, 2026, on ITV2 and ITVX, and is currently airing six nights a week from Mallorca.

angles.name: Love Island drama
angles.copy: Another week, another dose of Love Island drama! Who's coupled up, who's cracking on, and who's about to get dumped from the villa? Tune in tonight!

angles.name: Fan reactions
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up! What's been the most shocking moment so far this series? Tell us your thoughts!

moments.title: New TV Shows This Week
moments.blurb: New UK TV releases this week include 'The Hit List' and 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' on Saturday, July 25th, and 'Force Of Nature' on Sunday, July 26th.

angles.name: Weekend TV guide
angles.copy: What's on your watch list this weekend? New series of 'The Hit List' and 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' arrive on Saturday, plus 'Force Of Nature' on Sunday!

angles.name: Quiz show fun
angles.copy: Ready for some Saturday night fun? 'Celebrity Deal Or No Deal' is back! Who's hoping to see their favourite celeb take on the banker?

moments.title: Beyond Paradise Filming in Devon
moments.blurb: Filming for Series 5 of the popular BBC drama 'Beyond Paradise' has commenced in Devon this July.

angles.name: Local filming news
angles.copy: Exciting news for Devon! Filming for Series 5 of the much-loved drama 'Beyond Paradise' is officially underway right here in our beautiful county this month. Keep an eye out for the cast and crew!

angles.name: Spot the stars
angles.copy: Fancy spotting Humphrey and Martha? 'Beyond Paradise' is currently filming its new series across Devon. Where do you hope they set their next mystery?

moments.title: England School Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: Summer holidays for schools in England officially begin today, July 22nd, 2026.

angles.name: School's out!
angles.copy: It's official: school's out for summer across England! Hope all the kids (and parents!) have a fantastic break. What are your plans for the holidays?

angles.name: Summer plans
angles.copy: Happy first day of summer holidays to all the students in England! Wishing everyone a brilliant few weeks of fun, sun and relaxation. What's top of your summer bucket list?

moments.title: UK July Weather & Water Bans
moments.blurb: July 2026 has been very dry in England with only 3% of average rainfall, leading to drought conditions, high demand on water resources, and temporary use bans in several regions.

angles.name: Heatwave and water usage
angles.copy: With July being incredibly dry and water bans in place across parts of England, it's a reminder to be water-wise this summer. Every drop counts!

angles.name: Summer weather impact
angles.copy: It's been a very warm and dry July across the UK. How are you staying cool and making the most of the sunshine, while also being mindful of water restrictions?

moments.title: Jacoby Shaddix Turns 50
moments.blurb: Jacoby Shaddix, lead singer of American rock band Papa Roach, celebrates his 50th birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Rock legend birthday
angles.copy: Get ready to scream along! Papa Roach frontman Jacoby Shaddix turns 50 on July 28th. What's your favourite Papa Roach anthem?

angles.name: Celebrating a rock voice
angles.copy: Fifty years of Jacoby Shaddix! Wishing a very happy birthday to the powerhouse voice of Papa Roach on July 28th. Which track takes you back?

moments.title: Simon Kirke Turns 77
moments.blurb: Simon Kirke, drummer for legendary rock bands Free and Bad Company, celebrates his 77th birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Classic rock birthday
angles.copy: A true rock icon! Drummer Simon Kirke of Free and Bad Company turns 77 on July 28th. What's your favourite track featuring his unmistakable beat?

angles.name: Drumming legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 77th birthday to the incredible Simon Kirke on July 28th! From 'All Right Now' to 'Feel Like Makin' Love', his drumming defined an era. #ClassicRock #Free

moments.title: Steve Morse Turns 72
moments.blurb: Steve Morse, acclaimed guitarist known for his work with Deep Purple and The Dixie Dregs, celebrates his 72nd birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Guitar hero birthday
angles.copy: Happy 72nd birthday to the legendary guitarist Steve Morse on July 28th! From Deep Purple to The Dixie Dregs, his talent is undeniable. What's your favourite Steve Morse riff?

angles.name: Celebrating a guitar maestro
angles.copy: Wishing a fantastic 72nd birthday to guitar maestro Steve Morse on July 28th! A true innovator in rock. #GuitarLegend #NationRocks

moments.title: Cher Lloyd Turns 33
moments.blurb: British singer Cher Lloyd, known for hits like 'Swagger Jagger' and 'Want U Back', celebrates her 33rd birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Pop star birthday
angles.copy: Happy 33rd birthday to the one and only Cher Lloyd on July 28th! Feeling nostalgic for 'Swagger Jagger'?

angles.name: Celebrating a UK voice
angles.copy: Wishing a brilliant 33rd birthday to British pop star Cher Lloyd on July 28th! What's your favourite track from her?

moments.title: Brad Simpson Turns 31
moments.blurb: Brad Simpson, lead singer of popular British band The Vamps, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Boyband birthday
angles.copy: It's The Vamps' frontman Brad Simpson's 31st birthday on July 28th! Get ready to celebrate with us. What's your favourite Vamps track?

angles.name: Celebrating a pop voice
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 31st birthday to Brad Simpson from The Vamps on July 28th! Send your birthday wishes!

moments.title: Soulja Boy Turns 36
moments.blurb: American rapper Soulja Boy, known for his viral hit 'Crank That (Soulja Boy)', celebrates his 36th birthday on July 28th, 2026.

angles.name: Rapper's birthday
angles.copy: You know it! Soulja Boy turns 36 on July 28th. Still got 'Crank That' stuck in your head? #SouljaBoy #CrankThat

angles.name: Celebrating a viral hitmaker
angles.copy: Wishing a happy 36th birthday to the one and only Soulja Boy on July 28th! What a legacy of hits. #HipHop #NationHits
